chapter_title.ar: بَابُ مَنِ ادَّعَى الْإِمَامَةَ وَ لَيْسَ لَهَا بِأَهْلٍ وَ مَنْ جَحَدَ الْأَئِمَّةَ أَوْ بَعْضَهُمْ وَ مَنْ أَثْبَتَ الْإِمَامَةَ لِمَنْ لَيْسَ لَهَا بِأَهْلٍ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 85 – The one who claims the Imamate and he is not rightful for it, and the one who denies the Imams<sup>asws</sup>, or some of them<sup>asws</sup>, and the one who affirms the Imamate for the one who is not rightful for it

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/195)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/195)
text: سَأَلْتُ الشَّيْخَ عَنِ الْأَئِمَّةِ ( عليهم السلام )قَالَ مَنْ أَنْكَرَ وَاحِداً مِنَ الْأَحْيَاءِ فَقَدْ أَنْكَرَ الْأَمْوَاتَ .

en.hubeali: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Moalla Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Jamhour, from Safwan, from Ibn Muskan who said,

‘I asked the Sheykh (7<sup>th</sup> Imam<sup>asws</sup>) about the Imams<sup>asws</sup>. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The one who denies one<sup>asws</sup> from the living ones, so he has denied the departed ones’.
en.sarwar: 8. Al-Husayn ibn Muhammad has narrated from Mu‘alla ibn mmd from Muhammad ibn Jumhur from Safwan from ibn Maskan who has said the following. “I the Shaykh (Musa al-Kazim (a.s.) about the Imams. He said, ‘Whoever would reject any of the living Imams he has rejected the Imams who have passed away also.”
